metadata.title: StoryMagic — Real Stories You Can Touch
metadata.description: Bring back the magic of turning pages. Personalized stories printed on premium paper, designed to create moments of real connection.

hero.description: Bring back the magic of turning pages. Personalized stories printed on premium paper, designed to create moments of real connection, far from the glow of tablets.
hero.imageSubcaption: A sensory experience no screen can match.

howItWorks.title: Real magic in 3 artisanal steps
howItWorks.step1Description: Pick a plot designed to be read aloud and touch the heart.
howItWorks.step2Description: We tailor the watercolor-style illustrations so your child can recognize themselves.
howItWorks.step3Description: A physical book, lovingly bound, arrives at your door ready to be cherished.

bookCollection.title: Our Physical Library
bookCollection.subtitle: Limited editions on premium paper. Stories that feel better to the touch.
bookCollection.subtitleShowcase: Real examples created on our platform. Click to see the full book.

underwaterKingdom.title: The Underwater Kingdom
underwaterKingdom.description: Oceanic tones printed in archival quality.

quality.title: Objects made to stand the test of time
quality.description: It's not just a story, it's a tangible keepsake. We steer away from the digitally ephemeral to create sturdy books.
quality.bindingDescription: Thread-sewn with reinforced covers. Built to withstand the years and little hands.
quality.paperDescription: Munken 170g paper with a subtle cream tone to be gentle on the eyes. Naturally textured to the touch.

adventurePack.title: Artisanal Adventure Pack
adventurePack.description: The magic extends beyond the book. Includes a
adventurePack.descriptionEnd: from the main character, a sheet of matte stickers, and a wooden bookmark.

testimonials.title: Unplugged Families
testimonials.subtitle: What parents who chose paper over pixels have to say.

laura.name: Laura M.
laura.subtitle: Purchased "The Enchanted Forest"
laura.text: Finally something that doesn't need a charger. The book quality is stunning — it looks like it came from an antique bookshop, but with my son inside.

carlos.name: Carlos R.
carlos.subtitle: Purchased Premium Pack
carlos.text: The new-book smell when we opened the box was incredible. Physical details like the extra letter gave it a truly magical touch.

collectionOffer.title: Build their reading legacy
collectionOffer.description:
3 physical books = 20% discount.
Stories they'll keep for their own children.

footer.tagline:
Personalized storybook workshop.
Handcrafted, with ink and paper.
No batteries, just imagination.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: It seems this page got lost on an adventure. Let's head back home to find the way.

login.subtitle: Sign in to create your story

signup.subtitle: Create an account to start your adventure
signup.confirmationSent: We've sent a confirmation link to
signup.confirmationAction: Click the link to activate your account.
signup.upgradeSubtitle: Create an account to save your stories
signup.upgradeSuccessDesc: Your account has been created successfully. All your stories are saved in your library.

resetPassword.subtitle: Recover access to your account
resetPassword.title: Forgot your password?
resetPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to create a new password.
resetPassword.checkSpam: If you don't see the email, check your spam folder.

updatePassword.subtitle: Choose your new password
updatePassword.title: New password
updatePassword.successMessage: Your password has been changed successfully. Redirecting to sign in...
updatePassword.linkExpired: The link has expired or is invalid. Please request a new one.
updatePassword.linkError: Error verifying the link. Please request a new one.
updatePassword.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters

step1.title: How do you want to create this adventure?
step1.subtitle: Choose the perfect experience for today. You can customize every detail or let the magic surprise you.

solo.title: I create it myself
solo.subtitle: Magic Surprise
solo.description: Design the story in secret and give it as an unforgettable surprise gift. You have full control over the story and its details.

juntos.title: We create together
juntos.subtitle: Shared Adventure
juntos.description: An interactive experience designed to enjoy as a family. Choose characters, colors, and plot twists together with your little one.

step2.title: Create your little hero
step2.subtitle: Customize the magical details to make the story unique.
step2.specialTraitPlaceholder: E.g.: Just lost a tooth, starting school this year...
step2.specialTraitHint: This detail will make the story truly unique and personal.
step2.companionLabel: Do they have a pet or special friend?
step2.companionPlaceholder: E.g.: Their cat Whiskers, their sister Lucy, their teddy bear...
step2.companionHint: They may appear as a surprise character in the story.
step2.previewReady: Your hero is ready to live adventures with {interests}.
step2.previewDefault: Customize the magical details to make the story unique.
step2.interestsPrompt: Choose their interests to personalize the adventure...

step3.title: What adventure will {name} live?
step3.subtitle: Select a magical story to begin the journey. Each tale is designed to spark their imagination.

solo.title: The Book of a Thousand Choices
solo.subtitle: Customize the details of <highlight>{name}</highlight>'s story and watch the magic change.
solo.storyStart: Once upon a time there was a little explorer named
solo.storyLived: who lived at the edge of the unknown.
solo.unknownAfternoon: One afternoon, they decided to venture into the unknown...
solo.wouldFace: What they didn't know was that they would soon face
solo.specialMomentLabel: Is there a special moment you'd like to include?
solo.specialMomentPlaceholder: E.g.: Overcoming their fear of the dark, sharing with their sister, learning to be brave...
solo.specialMomentHint: The AI will weave this moment into the story naturally.

juntos.chooseNext: Choose the next step in the story!

step5.title: The Grand Finale
step5.subtitle: How do you want <highlight>{name}</highlight>'s adventure to end? You have the final word.
step5.dedicationPlaceholder:
Dear {name},
I wrote this story to remind you that you can always reach the stars.
With love, Mom.

guestGate.title: Your story is almost ready
guestGate.description: Sign in to save the story to your library and access it from any device, or continue as a guest to purchase it directly.
guestGate.loginAndSave: Sign in and save to my library
guestGate.guestNote: As a guest you can purchase your book, but it won't be saved to a personal library.

generar.waitMessage: This may take a few seconds. We're writing each scene with care.
generar.readyDescription: We've created a unique story with 8 personalized scenes. Time to see it!

messages.backpack: Your hero is packing their backpack...
messages.autoStories: The pages are coming to life...
messages.groups: The characters are getting to know each other...
messages.star: Painting a sky full of stars...
messages.autoAwesome: Adding a final touch of magic...

preview.downloadHint: Download a preview of the story in PDF format
preview.checkoutSubtitle: Choose the format and extras for your personalized book
preview.paymentSecure: Secure payment with Stripe. Shipping to all of Spain and Europe.
preview.saveForLaterHintAnonymous: Create a free account to save this book and buy it whenever you're ready.
preview.saveForLaterHintLoggedIn: Your book is already saved in your library.

success.title: Order confirmed!
success.descriptionWithOrder: Your story "{title}" for {name} is on its way.
success.descriptionGeneric: Your personalized story is on its way.
success.nextStepsDescription: You'll receive a confirmation email with shipping tracking information.
success.deliveryDescription: Spain: 5-7 business days. Europe: 7-12 business days.

dashboard.subtitle: Here you can see your stories, orders, and saved characters.

emptyStories.title: You haven't created any stories yet
emptyStories.description: Create your first personalized story and you'll see the result here.

emptyOrders.title: You don't have any orders yet
emptyOrders.description: When you purchase your first book, it will appear here with its shipping status.

emptyCharacters.title: You don't have any saved characters
emptyCharacters.description: When you create a story, your character will be saved here for reuse.

nameSection.label: Name
nameSection.hint: This name will appear on your profile and orders

passwordSection.label: Password
passwordSection.tooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters

guestNotice.title: Guest account
guestNotice.description: You're using a temporary account. If you sign out, you'll lose access to your stories. Create an account to save your progress.

adventurePack.label: Artisanal Adventure Pack
adventurePack.description: Turn the gift into a full experience
details: Handwritten letter from the character addressed to the child
6 matte illustrated stickers from the story
Wooden bookmark engraved with their name

digitalPdf.label: Digital PDF (instant)
digitalPdf.description: Get it right away, read it on any screen
details: Perfect for reading on a tablet, computer, or phone

extraCopy.label: Extra copy (softcover)
extraCopy.description: An additional copy to gift or keep at the grandparents' house
details: Ideal for grandparents, godparents, or co-parents

showcase.createHint: Personalize a unique book for your child
